message:
feat(scheduler): Add multi-worker 3-lane scheduler with work stealing

Implements the parallel scheduler infrastructure for Phase 1 multi-threaded
execution while maintaining strict priority ordering: cancel > timed > ready.

## Global Injector (`src/runtime/scheduler/global_injector.rs`)

Lane-aware global injection queue for cross-thread task wakeups:

- Separate SegQueue per lane (cancel, timed, ready)
- PriorityTask and TimedTask structs with scheduling metadata
- Atomic pending count for metrics and load-balancing decisions
- Thread-safe injection and pop operations

## Three-Lane Scheduler (`src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs`)

Multi-worker scheduler coordinating work-stealing across threads:

- ThreeLaneScheduler: Creates workers, manages global injection, shutdown
- ThreeLaneWorker: Per-worker scheduling loop with strict lane ordering:
  1. Cancel work (global then local) - never starved
  2. Timed work (global then local) - EDF ordering
  3. Ready work (global then local) - priority ordering
  4. Steal from other workers (ready lane only)
  5. Park until woken

Key design decisions:
- Stealing only from ready lane preserves cancel/timed priority semantics
- DetRng for deterministic stealing decisions (round-robin with randomization)
- Parker-based idle worker management

## Priority Scheduler Extensions (`src/runtime/scheduler/priority.rs`)

Added lane-specific pop methods for multi-worker use:

- pop_cancel_only(), pop_cancel_only_with_hint()
- pop_timed_only(), pop_timed_only_with_hint()
- pop_ready_only(), pop_ready_only_with_hint()
- steal_ready_batch(max_steal) - batch stealing for efficiency
- has_cancel_work(), has_timed_work(), has_ready_work() - lane queries

## Local Queue Concurrent Test (`src/runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs`)

Added concurrent_owner_and_stealers_preserve_tasks test:
- Verifies no task duplication or loss under contention
- 512 tasks with 4 stealers + owner racing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
